hero.title: THE ROYAL INVITATION
hero.families: "Together With Their Families Cordially Invite You To Celebrate Their Wedding"

welcome.quote: "Once in a while, right in the middle of an ordinary life, love gives us a fairy tale."
welcome.heading: WELCOME TO OUR BEGINNING
welcome.desc: We are overjoyed to invite you to join us in celebrating our wedding festivities in Palamu, Jharkhand. As we take our sacred vows and begin our walk into forever under Ganesha's divine sight, your presence, blessings, and laughter will make our union truly unforgettable.

m1.title: When Two Worlds Met
m1.desc: A crisp December afternoon, two families, and a first meeting that changed everything. She was wonderfully shy — soft smiles replacing words — but slowly, warmth found its way through. Then came the moment we still laugh about: our families forgot the traditional Sagun and had to return. In that small, unscripted pause, she smiled — and that smile became my very first favourite memory. Both families bonded instantly. My younger brother couldn't stop teasing me. The day ended in laughter, warmth, and the quiet feeling that something beautiful had just begun.

m2.title: Our First Chapter Together
m2.desc: Three months later, we met again — and everything felt wonderfully familiar. We exchanged gifts thoughtfully: I gave her earrings, bangles, hair accessories, and chocolates; she surprised me with so many KitKat bars I couldn't stop smiling. We shared a warm meal, then explored the Son River together. Out on the water, mid-boat ride, we celebrated our very first Holi — colours flying, laughter everywhere. Every moment was captured in photographs and videos. It was the kind of day you carry in your heart forever.

m3.title: A Day the Heart Remembers
m3.desc: Some days need no grand occasion — just good company and the open road. We explored the city, enjoyed a meal, and took a long, joyful bike ride that felt like freedom. Between moments, she surprised me with a beautiful shirt she had thoughtfully chosen. I gave her chocolates in return. We clicked photographs, made videos, and laughed through every simple moment. Unhurried and entirely ours. By the time the day ended, we both knew — the simplest days make the most beautiful memories.

groom.name: Er. Deepak Kumar
groom.parents: Son of Mr. Vijendra Prasad & Mrs. Nirmala Devi (Sahiya)
groom.quote: "I choose you, and I will choose you over and over. Without pause, in a heartbeat, I will keep choosing you."

bride.name: Chandani Kumari
bride.parents: Daughter of Mr. Satish Chandravanshi & Mrs. Binita Devi
bride.quote: "You are my today and all of my tomorrows. My heart is and always will be yours."

tilak.title: TILAK CEREMONY
tilak.desc: The auspicious pre-wedding ritual marking the formal acceptance of the groom with traditional blessings and royal gifts.

haldi.title: HALDI CEREMONY
haldi.desc: A vibrant ceremony of love and laughter as we apply golden turmeric paste, accompanied by traditional songs and music.

ghidhahri.title: GHIDHAHRI CEREMONY
ghidhahri.desc: A sacred family ritual dedicated to worshipping the household deity and seeking divine blessings for the upcoming wedding celebrations. Family members gather together to perform traditional prayers and rituals in a spiritual atmosphere.

mehndi.title: MEHNDI CEREMONY
mehndi.desc: Adorning the bride's hands with beautiful, intricate henna designs amidst music, joy, and blessings.

wedding.title: WEDDING CEREMONY
wedding.desc: The grand wedding procession (Barat) followed by the sacred pheras around the holy fire to unite our souls forever.

countdown.sub: Counting Down to the Sacred Union
countdown.title: THE CELEBRATION BEGINS IN

venue.title: THE WEDDING VENUE
venue.desc: Celebrating the wedding of Deepak & Chandani in Palamu, Jharkhand.

air.title: By Air
air.desc: Birsa Munda Airport (IXR) in Ranchi or Gaya Airport (GAY) are the nearest airports. Pre-arranged shuttle transfers can be organized.

train.title: By Train
train.desc: Mohammad Ganj (MGS) or Japla (JPL) Railway Stations are the nearest transit points, connecting you directly to the venues.

gift.title: REGISTRY & BLESSINGS
gift.desc: Your blessings and presence at our wedding are the most precious gifts we could ever receive. However, if you wish to honor us with a gift or virtual Shagun, we have set up this registry card for your convenience.
gift.upi: Or transfer directly using UPI ID:

footer.quote: "Your love, support, and blessings mean the world to us. We cannot wait to raise a toast to our new beginning together with you."
footer.blessing: May every step of this beautiful journey be blessed with joy, peace, and eternal love.
